message:
feat(html_export): inline tool popovers instead of data-attribute approach

Replace the data-attribute-based tool popover system with inline HTML
popovers rendered directly inside each tool badge button:

- Remove truncation of tool input/output to 200/500 chars; display
  full content in popovers so users can inspect complete tool calls
- Pretty-print JSON input/output via format_json_or_raw before
  HTML-escaping into popover sections
- Render popover HTML (header, input section, output section) as
  children of the badge button element, eliminating the need for
  JavaScript to construct popover content from data attributes
- Add status badge span inside popover header for visual context
- Update tests to assert on inline popover structure rather than
  data-tool-input/data-tool-output attributes

This improves reliability (popovers work even if JS partially fails)
and removes the content-length limitation that previously hid useful
debugging information from exported session views.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
